_comment: SILLY child dialogue, keyed by PERSONA (see kid_voices.json). Categories: chatter (random kid chatter), parent (kid whining AT their parent), play (playground squeals/laughs), tag / hide / rlgl (game callouts for Tag, Hide-and-Seek, Red-Light-Green-Light). PARENT_* keys are generic parent-to-kid lines on existing adult voices. Tone markers are stripped by speakable() at synth time.

chatter: I can run SO fast, watch me!
Do you like dinosaurs? I LOVE dinosaurs!
Look how high I can jump!
Bet you can't do this!
parent: Can we get ice cream, please? Pleeease?
Look at me! Look look look!
hide: One, two, three, ready or not, here I come!

chatter: I'm the fastest kid in the whole world!
Watch this, watch this!
I scored a hundred points!
I'm not tired, you're tired!
parent: I don't wanna go home yet!
Can I get new sneakers? Pleeease?
play: Last one there's a rotten egg!
hide: You're cheating, I can see your feet!
rlgl: Red light! You moved! Back to the start!

chatter: My tooth is loose. See? Wiggle wiggle.
I found a really cool rock.
I'm gonna be an astronaut.
Where did the ducky go?
parent: Carry me, my legs are tired.
I'm hungry, can we eat now?
hide: Ready or not, here I come!

chatter: Wanna see me do a cartwheel?
I can do a somersault, watch!
My shoes light up when I stomp!
I'm the jump rope champion!
play: This is the best day ever!
hide: One, two, three, four, ready or not!

chatter: I like unicorns and rainbows.
Do you wanna be my friend?
I picked a pretty flower.
My kitty is named Sprinkles.
parent: Can we get ice cream? Pretty please?
hide: Ready or not, here I come!

chatter: Watch me, watch me spin!
I can count all the way to a hundred!
My abuela makes the best cookies!
I have new sparkly shoes!
parent: Mami, can we get ice cream, please?
hide: One, two, three, ready or not, here I come!
rlgl: Red light! You moved, go back!

chatter: Look how fast I can run!
I got a gold star at school today!
Do you want to see my drawing?
I can hop on one foot!
parent: Please, please can I have that?
I'm tired, will you carry me?
hide: Ready or not, here I come!
I found you, you were cheating!

tokid: Slow down! Don't run too far ahead.
Hold my hand crossing the street.
Stay where I can see you.
Five more minutes, then we head home.
